# rTPC

**rTPC** is an R package that helps fit thermal performance curves
(TPCs) in R. **rTPC** contains 49 model formulations previously used to
fit TPCs and has helper functions to help set sensible start parameters,
upper and lower parameter limits and estimate parameters useful in
downstream analyses, such as cardinal temperatures, maximum rate and
optimum temperature.

The idea behind **rTPC** is to make fitting thermal performance curves
easier, to provide workflows and examples of fitting TPCs without saying
which model works best. Which model and which workflow is “best” is
going to be down to the question that is being asked. Throughout the
vignettes, *Things to consider* sections give some key considerations
about what to consider *before* and *during* the analysis.

When developing **rTPC**, we made a conscious decision not to repeat
code and methods that are already optimised and available in the R
ecosystem. Consequently, the workflows take advantage of
[**nls.multstart**](https://github.com/padpadpadpad/nls.multstart) for
fitting non-linear least squares regression and packages from the
[**tidyverse**](https://www.tidyverse.org) for data manipulation,
fitting multiple models, and visualisation. The R package
[**car**](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=car/car.pdf) is used
extensively for the bootstrapping approaches.

**rTPC** and the pipelines outlined in the vignettes are published in
[Methods in Ecology and
Evolution](https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.13585) and are open access.

## Citation

If this R package helps you, please cite the R package:

Padfield D, O’Sullivan H, Windram F (2024). *rTPC: Fitting and Analysing
Thermal Performance Curves*. R package version 1.0.7,
<https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/>,
<https://github.com/padpadpadpad/rTPC>

This allows all developers of the package to get credit for the work
they are doing, since Francis Windram was key to driving the development
and improvement of **rTPC** after the publication in MEE.

You can also cite the publication in Methods in Ecology and Evolution,
but please cite the R packages **rTPC** and **nls.multstart** as well:

Daniel Padfield, Hannah O’Sullivan, & Samraat Pawar (2021). rTPC and
nls.multstart: A new pipeline to fit thermal performance curves in R.
Methods in Ecology and Evolution.
<https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.13585>

## Bugs and suggestions

Please report any bugs and suggestions to the
[Issues](https://github.com/padpadpadpad/rTPC/issues) or email
<d.padfield@exeter.ac.uk>. This could be requests for the inclusion of a
new mathematical model formulation.

## Installation

The devlopment version of **rTPC** - which likely includes up to date
fixes and new models - can be installed from GitHub using the
`remotes::install_github()`. The vignettes are all available online, but
if you would like to build them locally, add `build_vignettes = TRUE`
into your `install_github()` command. However, we do not recommend doing
this due to the number of extra R packages utilised in the vignettes.

``` r
# install package from GitHub
remotes::install_github("padpadpadpad/rTPC")
```

**rTPC** can also easily be downloaded from CRAN.

``` r
# install package from CRAN
install.packages('rTPC')
```

## General pipeline

**rTPC** makes it easy to fit multiple models to multiple thermal
performance curves.

![](reference/figures/rTPC_pipeline.png)

**Figure 1. General pipeline for fitting thermal performance curves
using rTPC**. (1) Collect, check, and manipulate data into long format.
(2) Choose which models from rTPC are going to be used. Here, a random
assortment of four models were chosen. (3) Fit the models to data using
nls.multstart and helper functions from rTPC. (4) Models can be
visualised and (5) common traits of TPCs can be estimated using
**rTPC::calc_params()**. (6) This simple pipeline can easily be scaled
up to be used on multiple curves.

## Extensions to the pipeline

**rTPC** can also be easily used to do a number of common tasks needed
when fitting TPCs, such as model selection, model averaging,
incorporating model weights and bootstrapping of model fits.

![](reference/figures/rTPC_pipeline_extensions.png)

**Figure 2. Potential applications for fitting thermal performance
curves using rTPC**. (1) AIC, BIC or other metrics of model fit can be
calculated to help to allow model selection or model averaging. (2) If
TPCs are being fit to averages of multiple replicates, then weighted
NLLS can be used that reduce parameter bias. (3) After the model has
been fitted, non-parametric bootstrapping approaches can help estimate
model uncertainty and calculate confidence intervals of parameters.

## Getting started

- For an introduction to **rTPC**, see
  [`vignette("rTPC")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/rTPC.md)
- To follow the general pipeline, see
  [`vignette("fit_many_models")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/fit_many_models.md)
  and
  [`vignette("fit_many_curves")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/fit_many_curves.md).
- For examples of extensions to this pipeline, see the
  [`vignette("model_averaging_selection")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/model_averaging_selection.md),
  [`vignette("model_weighting")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/model_weighting.md),
  [`vignette("bootstrapping_models")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/bootstrapping_models.md),
  [`vignette("weighted_bootstrapping")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/weighted_bootstrapping.md),
  and
  [`vignette("bootstrapping_many_curves")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/bootstrapping_many_curves.md).
- For an example of how to parallelise **rTPC**, see
  [`vignette("quickfit_parallel")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/quickfit_parallel.md).
- To add a model to **rTPC**, see
  [`vignette("adding_models")`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/adding_models.md).

# Package index

## Models

TPC models for fitting.

- [`analytiskontodimas_2004()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/analytiskontodimas_2004.md)
  : Analytis-Kontodimas model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`ashrafi1_2018()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/ashrafi1_2018.md)
  : Ashrafi I model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`ashrafi2_2018()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/ashrafi2_2018.md)
  : Ashrafi II model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`ashrafi3_2018()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/ashrafi3_2018.md)
  : Ashrafi III model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`ashrafi4_2018()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/ashrafi4_2018.md)
  : Ashrafi IV model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`ashrafi5_2018()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/ashrafi5_2018.md)
  : Ashrafi V model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`atkin_2005()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/atkin_2005.md)
  : Atkin model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`beta_2012()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/beta_2012.md)
  : Beta model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`betatypesimplified_2008()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/betatypesimplified_2008.md)
  : Simplified Beta-type model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`boatman_2017()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/boatman_2017.md)
  : Boatman model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`briere1_1999()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/briere1_1999.md)
  : Brière I model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`briere1simplified_1999()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/briere1simplified_1999.md)
  : Simplified Brière I model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`briere2_1999()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/briere2_1999.md)
  : Brière II model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`briere2simplified_1999()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/briere2simplified_1999.md)
  : Simplified Brière II model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`briereextended_2021()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/briereextended_2021.md)
  : Extended Brière model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`briereextendedsimplified_2021()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/briereextendedsimplified_2021.md)
  : Simplified Extended Brière model for fitting thermal performance
  curves
- [`delong_2017()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/delong_2017.md)
  : DeLong enzyme-assisted Arrhenius model for fitting thermal
  performance curves
- [`deutsch_2008()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/deutsch_2008.md)
  : Modified deutsch model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`eubank_1973()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/eubank_1973.md)
  : Eubank model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`flextpc_2024()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/flextpc_2024.md)
  : flexTPC model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`flinn_1991()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/flinn_1991.md)
  : Flinn model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`gaussian_1987()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/gaussian_1987.md)
  : Gaussian model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`gaussianmodified_2006()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/gaussianmodified_2006.md)
  : Modified gaussian model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`hinshelwood_1947()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/hinshelwood_1947.md)
  : Hinshelwood model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`janisch1_1925()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/janisch1_1925.md)
  : Janisch I model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`janisch2_1925()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/janisch2_1925.md)
  : Janisch II model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`joehnk_2008()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/joehnk_2008.md)
  : Jöhnk model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`johnsonlewin_1946()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/johnsonlewin_1946.md)
  : Johnson-Lewin model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`kamykowski_1985()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/kamykowski_1985.md)
  : Kamykowski model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`lactin2_1995()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/lactin2_1995.md)
  : Lactin2 model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`lobry_1991()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/lobry_1991.md)
  : Lobry model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`mitchell_2009()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/mitchell_2009.md)
  : Mitchell Angilletta model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`oneill_1972()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/oneill_1972.md)
  : O'Neill model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`pawar_2018()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/pawar_2018.md)
  : Pawar model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`quadratic_2008()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/quadratic_2008.md)
  : Quadratic model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`ratkowsky_1983()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/ratkowsky_1983.md)
  : Ratkowsky model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`rezende_2019()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/rezende_2019.md)
  : Rezende model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`rosso_1993()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/rosso_1993.md)
  : Rosso model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`sharpeschoolfull_1981()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/sharpeschoolfull_1981.md)
  : Full Sharpe-Schoolfield model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`sharpeschoolhigh_1981()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/sharpeschoolhigh_1981.md)
  : Sharpe-Schoolfield model (high temperature inactivation only) for
  fitting thermal performance curves
- [`sharpeschoollow_1981()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/sharpeschoollow_1981.md)
  : Sharpe-Schoolfield model (low temperature inactivation only) for
  fitting thermal performance curves
- [`spain_1982()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/spain_1982.md)
  : Spain model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`stinner_1974()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/stinner_1974.md)
  : Stinner model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`taylorsexton_1972()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/taylorsexton_1972.md)
  : Taylor-Sexton model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`thomas_2012()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/thomas_2012.md)
  : Thomas model (2012) for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`thomas_2017()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/thomas_2017.md)
  : Thomas model (2017) for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`tomlinsonphillips_2015()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/tomlinsonphillips_2015.md)
  : Tomlinson-Phillips model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`warrendreyer_2006()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/warrendreyer_2006.md)
  : Warren-Dreyer model for fitting thermal performance curves
- [`weibull_1995()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/weibull_1995.md)
  : Weibull model for fitting thermal performance curves

## Helper functions

Functions to aid in generating starting values or limits.

- [`get_lower_lims()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_lower_lims.md)
  : Set broad lower limits on parameter values
- [`get_model_names()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_model_names.md)
  : Lists or searches the models available in rTPC
- [`get_start_vals()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_start_vals.md)
  : Estimate start values for TPC fitting
- [`get_tpc_as_formula()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_tpc_as_formula.md)
  : Get a formula object for calling a TPC
- [`get_upper_lims()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_upper_lims.md)
  : Set broad upper limits on parameter values
- [`quickfit_tpc()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/quickfit_tpc.md)
  : Perform a quick, automated, TPC fit
- [`quickfit_tpc_multi()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/quickfit_tpc_multi.md)
  : Perform an automated quick tpc fit across models and curves

## Calculating parameters

Functions for calculating parameters of interest.

- [`calc_params()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/calc_params.md)
  : Calculate extra parameters of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_breadth()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_breadth.md)
  : Estimate thermal performance breadth of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_ctmax()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_ctmax.md)
  : Estimate the critical thermal maximum of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_ctmin()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_ctmin.md)
  : Estimate the critical thermal minimum of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_e()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_e.md) :
  Estimate the activation energy of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_eh()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_eh.md)
  : Estimate the deactivation energy of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_q10()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_q10.md)
  : Estimate the q10 value of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_rmax()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_rmax.md)
  : Estimate maximum rate of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_skewness()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_skewness.md)
  : Estimates skewness of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_thermalsafetymargin()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_thermalsafetymargin.md)
  : Estimate thermal safety margin of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_thermaltolerance()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_thermaltolerance.md)
  : Estimate thermal tolerance of a thermal performance curve
- [`get_topt()`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/get_topt.md)
  : Estimate optimum temperature of a thermal performance curve

## Data

- [`bacteria_tpc`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/bacteria_tpc.md)
  : Example thermal performance curves of bacterial growth
- [`chlorella_tpc`](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/reference/chlorella_tpc.md)
  : Example metabolic thermal performance curves

  rTPC](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/model_weighting.md):

  rTPC](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/model_averaging_selection.md):

  rTPC](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/bootstrapping_models.md):

  rTPC](https://padpadpadpad.github.io/rTPC/articles/weighted_bootstrapping.md):
